raw_consumer_statement:
Barclay Card 's website is not allowing me to dispute two transactions. 

I purchased two one way tickets with XXXX using my points, and paid XXXX in cash for taxes for the tickets. I recently cancelled the flights, and was refunded the points but not the cash. I tried to dispute these transactions with Barclays, but their website is physically not allowing me to go through with the dispute. 

I've attached an image of the transactions in question ( XX/XX/XXXX, {$5.00}, XXXX ), and the flight cancellations showing my refund.
